Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Lia.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

Definition excluded_middle := forall P : Prop, P \/ ~ P.

(* === repeats: a list contains at least one duplicate element === *)

Definition repeats {X : Type} (l : list X) : Prop :=
  (fix rep (l' : list X) : Prop :=
     match l' with
     | [] => False
     | x :: xs => In x xs \/ rep xs
     end) l.

(* === Helper lemma === *)

Lemma in_split : forall (X : Type) (x : X) (l : list X),
  In x l -> exists l1 l2, l = l1 ++ x :: l2.
Proof.
  intros X x l H. induction l as [| y l' IH].
  - destruct H.
  - destruct H as [H | H].
    + subst. exists [], l'. reflexivity.
    + apply IH in H. destruct H as [l1 [l2 H]]. subst.
      exists (y :: l1), l2. reflexivity.
Qed.

(* === Main theorem: pigeonhole principle === *)

Theorem pigeonhole_principle :
  excluded_middle ->
  forall (X : Type) (l1 l2 : list X),
    (forall x, In x l1 -> In x l2) ->
    length l2 < length l1 ->
    repeats l1.
Proof.
  intros EM X l1. induction l1 as [| x l1' IH].
  - intros l2 H_in H_len. simpl in H_len. lia.
  - intros l2 H_in H_len.
    simpl.
    assert (H_EM : In x l1' \/ ~ In x l1') by apply EM.
    destruct H_EM as [Hx | Hx].
    + left. exact Hx.
    + right.
      assert (Hxl2 : In x l2) by (apply H_in; simpl; left; reflexivity).
      pose proof (in_split X x l2 Hxl2) as [l2a [l2b Heq]].
      set (l2' := l2a ++ l2b).
      assert (H_len_l2' : length l2' < length l1').
      { subst l2'. rewrite Heq in H_len. rewrite app_length in *. simpl in H_len. lia. }
      assert (H_in' : forall y, In y l1' -> In y l2').
      { intros y Hy.
        assert (Hyl2 : In y l2) by (apply H_in; simpl; right; exact Hy).
        rewrite Heq in Hyl2.
        apply in_app_or in Hyl2.
        subst l2'. apply in_or_app.
        destruct Hyl2 as [Hyl2a | Hyl2b].
        - left. exact Hyl2a.
        - right. simpl in Hyl2b. destruct Hyl2b as [Hyx | Hyl2b].
          + subst y. contradiction.
          + exact Hyl2b. }
      apply (IH l2' H_in' H_len_l2').
Qed.
